since_last: 60% of 85 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.30%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.04% · BTC -0.69% · Gold +0.69% · Nasdaq100 +0.26%. 60% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.30%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.30%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +8.55%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +8.55%, LRCX +5.94%, TER +4.80%, ASML +4.67%, AVGO +4.45%. Laggards: SNAP -5.04%, AI -2.79%, META -2.46%, PINS -2.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.79% at $194.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.79% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
